creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

portupgrade fail after reboot !

with ruby18 :

urban# portupgrade -aOW
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:118:in `fill': MOVED file format error (PortsDB::MOVEDError)
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:112:in `each'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:112:in `fill'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:111:in `open'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:111:in `fill'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:106:in `initialize'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:181:in `new'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb:181:in `setup'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/pkgtools.rb:246:in `init_pkgtools_global'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:522:in `main'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/optparse.rb:791:in `initialize'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:230:in `new'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:230:in `main'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:2234
urban# 

With ruby19 :

product# portupgrade -aOW
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:118:in `block (2 levels) in fill': MOVED file format error (PortsDB::MOVEDError)
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:112:in `each'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:112:in `block in fill'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:111:in `open'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:111:in `fill'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:106:in `initialize'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:181:in `new'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/portsdb.rb:181:in `setup'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.9/pkgtools.rb:246:in `init_pkgtools_global'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:522:in `block in main'
	from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.9/optparse.rb:882:in `initialize'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:230:in `new'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:230:in `main'
	from /usr/local/sbin/portupgrade:2234:in `<main>'
product# 

I use much portupgrade ...

Best regards, thanks you,

Eric Douzet
